title: Discussion/ Update on boards
excerpt: When you update a board with new column. How can you notify your team to start updating content for that column? In general teams should be able  create a discussion in a dashboard regarding updates / changes or assignme…

posts.author: Daniel_Ellis (Daniel Ellis)
posts.cookedHtml: When you update a board with new column. How can you notify your team to start updating content for that column? In general teams should be able create a discussion in a dashboard regarding updates / changes or assignments.
